lead_aesthetic: Sculptural, architectural, refined British luxury — sharp tailoring, draped jersey, the iconic Galaxy dress silhouette. Mature, high-fashion, considered. Worn by Cate Blanchett, Victoria Beckham, royalty.

site_analysis.summary: Occasion-wear house leaning on poetic, nature-inspired seasonal storytelling and a broad 'dressed for every moment' wardrobe across cocktail, evening, and bridal.

leading_angle.label: Poetic Seasonal Storytelling
leading_angle.angle_explanation: They lead with an evocative, mood-driven collection narrative rather than product specs or designer pedigree — selling the feeling of a season, not the dress.
leading_angle.verbatim_proof: Utsuroi — the Japanese art of subtle transition. A garden at its fullest. Petals opening, blossom drifting across still water. An afternoon turning, imperceptibly, toward evening.
leading_angle.why_it_works: Their occasion-wear buyer is shopping for an emotional moment (wedding, gala, milestone), so a romantic, sensorial frame converts better than technical fashion language.

secondary_angles.label: Occasion Wardrobe Breadth
secondary_angles.verbatim_proof: Cocktail Evening Signature Day Fur Free Organza Floral Satin Wedding Shop Black Tie Cocktail Mother of the Bride Bridesmaids Bridal

secondary_angles.label: Day-to-Evening Versatility
secondary_angles.verbatim_proof: Daytime into Evening Shop the Capsule Dressed for the Moment

likely_ad_directions: They would likely test mood-led seasonal launch creative built around the 'Utsuroi / Softness Blooms' Summer 2026 narrative, leaning on cinematic florals and water imagery.
They would likely test occasion-segmented campaigns (Mother of the Bride, Bridesmaids, Black Tie, Cocktail Hour) targeting wedding-intent and event-driven shoppers.
They would likely test a 'Daytime into Evening' capsule angle aimed at versatility-seekers who want one dress to span multiple moments.
They would likely test a print/floral story angle ('A Print Story', 'Shop Summer Florals') as a soft, scroll-stopping hook for warm audiences.
They would likely test email-capture lead ads using the 'first access to new collections' promise, since their site already leans on this list-building hook.
swipeable_headlines: Utsuroi — the Japanese art of subtle transition.
An afternoon turning, imperceptibly, toward evening.
A garden at its fullest. Petals opening, blossom drifting across still water.

ads_analysis.summary: Ladivine leans almost entirely on aspirational 'main character' fantasy hooks tied to black-tie occasions, using sensory product detail and spotlight imagery rather than offers or social proof.

hooks.label: Spotlight Fantasy
hooks.pattern_explanation: Casts the wearer as the center of attention at a high-stakes event, selling the emotional payoff of being seen rather than the garment itself.
hooks.example_copy: All eyes on you at your next black tie affair with our unforgettable gowns.
hooks.why_it_works: Occasion-anchored aspiration converts cold traffic by attaching the product to a vivid future moment; testable as a TOF angle for event-driven gown collections.

hooks.label: Occasion Anchoring
hooks.pattern_explanation: Names a specific high-stakes context (black tie affair, black tie event) so the viewer self-qualifies based on an upcoming need.
hooks.example_copy: Bring the drama and steal the spotlight on your next black tie event ✨
hooks.why_it_works: Tying the offer to a concrete event triggers timely intent and filters audiences by purchase window; useful for MOF retargeting around event seasons.

hooks.label: Sensory Product Detail
hooks.pattern_explanation: Opens with tactile, cinematic descriptions of fabric and construction to evoke craftsmanship and desire before any CTA.
hooks.example_copy: Glittering beadwork cascades over a sheer corset bodice, ready to make an entrance.
hooks.why_it_works: Specific texture/material language signals quality and slows the scroll on image-led creative; works well for product-page-direct ads on hero SKUs.

hooks.label: Bestseller Authority
hooks.pattern_explanation: A soft social-proof signal embedded in the copy that implies validation through popularity without naming numbers.
hooks.example_copy: Our best-selling dresses don't just make an entrance, they own the night.
hooks.why_it_works: 'Bestseller' framing borrows crowd validation while staying on-brand for luxury; testable as a collection-level hook where reviews aren't the lead asset.

swipeable_headlines: All eyes on you at your next black tie affair
Bring the drama and steal the spotlight on your next black tie event
Our best-selling dresses don't just make an entrance, they own the night
Glittering beadwork cascades over a sheer corset bodice, ready to make an entrance
